name: Fix consent test-seed reset FK ordering for consent grants
description: Consent journey teardown can leave seeded accounts behind because resetSeededAccounts deletes consent_grant rows while consent_request still references them.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: deleteOrganizationGraph deletes consent_grant before deleting consent_request rows that reference consent_request.consent_grant_id -> consent_grant.id, so teardown can fail with a FK violation after consent approval/withdrawal journeys. Variants: cleanup must handle approved consent requests linked to a grant, failed/partial J-13/J-21 runs, and repeated reseeding of the same alias without stale consent rows. Regression test: add or update test-seed cleanup coverage so resetSeededAccounts/deleteOrganizationGraph deletes or otherwise clears consent_request rows before consent_grant deletion; rerun J-13/J-21 or the focused seed-cleanup test and confirm global teardown exits cleanly even when journey assertions fail.
